reviews.comment:
Es YPF ACA de san Salvador de Jujuy. Hice cambio de aceite y filtros. Mal atendido. El operario inexperto.  No hay autoridad. Solo hacer carga de combustible. Se demoran mucho

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF ACA station in San Salvador de Jujuy. I had my oil and filters changed. The service was poor. The attendant was inexperienced. There's no authority. They only seem to do fuel. They take forever.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROC1QUlV3EAE
